name: Spaghetti Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the spaghetti in half and cook until al dente. Drain and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cooked spaghetti with beaten eggs and grated Parmesan cheese. Mix well.
3. Pour the egg mixture into two 10-inch pie plates and spread evenly with a spoon.
4. Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until soft.
5. Stir in the sour cream and pour over the spaghetti layer.
6. Remove the Italian sausage from its casing, crumble it, and cook in the same skillet until heated through.
7. Combine the cooked sausage with the tomato paste and water. Simmer for 10 minutes.
8. Spoon the sausaged mixture over the sour cream layer.
9. Sprinkle the shredded mozzarella cheese evenly over the top of the pie.
10. Return the pie to the oven and bake at 350°F (175°C) until the cheese is melted and bubbly, about 30 minutes.
